message:
feat(fsfs): implement high-cost artifact detection contract with runtime detector

Expand the high-cost artifact module (~145 new lines) to implement the
fsfs-high-cost-artifact-detection-contract v1:

- Add kind constants, detector name constants, and 10 reason code
  constants (FSFS_HIGH_COST_SIZE_EXCEEDED, CHURN_DETECTED, etc.)
- Implement Default for all detector structs with production-safe
  default thresholds
- Add ContractDefinition, ArtifactDecision, and OverrideEvent structs
- Comprehensive unit tests for serde round-trips and defaults
- Minor control_plane.rs formatting fix

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
